title: benthamia menziesii
intro: Benthamia menziesii, also known as the Menzies' benthamia, is a flowering plant species within the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Benthamia menziesii include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
